question:
Study the following information carefully and

answer the questions accordingly.

Eight Persons- A, B, C, D, E, F, G and H are

working in a department in different designation

viz-Chairman, CFO, GM, DGM, AGM, Manager,

Junior Manager and Clerk. All the designations

given are to be considered in a given order (as

Chairman is considered as Senior-most and Clerk

is considered as the Junior-most).

Only two person are designated between G and

H who is junior to D. The number of persons

junior to A is same as the number of persons

senior to C. Only One person is designated

between B and C who is a junior manager. G is

not adjacent to A. E is not junior to G.

Four of the following five are alike in a certain

way and hence they form a group. Which one of

the following does not belong to that group?
question_html:
Study the following information carefully and

and C who is a junior manager.

A

question:
Read the information given below carefully and

answer the following question.

In an organisation, nine people i.e. A, B, C, D, E, F,

G, H, and I are working in different departments

viz. Marketing, Finance and HR. At least two

people are working in these departments but not

more than four people can work in one

departments. Only A is working with E in the

same department. H and B are working in

different departments but not in HR department.

G is working in the marketing department. I is

neither working in the marketing department nor

in the HR department. D is not working with I but

working with B. C is working in finance

department. C and E are working in different

departments. Only three persons are working in

marketing department.

Four of the following five are alike in a certain

way and thus forms a group, find the one which

doesn't belong to that group.
question_html:
Read the information given below carefully and

answer the following question.

people are working in these departments but not

more than four people can work in one

departments. Only A is working with E in the

different departments but not in HR department.

G is working in the marketing department. I is

neither working in the marketing department nor

in the HR department. D is not working with I but

working with B. C is working in finance

department. C and E are working in different

departments. Only three persons are working in

marketing department.

Four of the following five are alike in a certain

way and thus forms a group, find the one which

doesn't belong to that group.

neither working in the marketing department nor

in the HR department. D is not working with I but

working with B. C is working in finance

department. C and E are working in different

departments. Only three persons are working in

marketing department.

Four of the following five are alike in a certain

way and thus forms a group, find the one which

doesn't belong to that group.
explanation:
H and B are working in different departments

but not in HR department therefore there will

be two cases.

Case-1

HR

FINANCE
H

MARKETING B

Case-2

HR

FINANCE
B

MARKETING H 

G is working in the marketing department

I is neither working in the marketing

department nor in the HR department

Case-1

HR

FINANCE
H I

MARKETING B G

Case-2

HR

FINANCE
B I

MARKETING H G 

D is not working with I but working with B,

therefore, Case-2 will get eliminated.

C is working in finance department

HR

FINANCE
H I C

MARKETING B G D

questionHtml:
Read the information given below carefully and

answer the following question.

In an organisation, nine people i.e. A, B, C, D, E, F,

G, H, and I are working in different departments

viz. Marketing, Finance and HR. At least two

people are working in these departments but not

more than four people can work in one

departments. Only A is working with E in the

same department. H and B are working in

different departments but not in HR department.

G is working in the marketing department. I is

neither working in the marketing department nor

in the HR department. D is not working with I but

working with B. C is working in finance

department. C and E are working in different

departments. Only three persons are working in

marketing department

Who among the following is working together?
explanation:
H and B are working in different departments

but not in HR department therefore there will

be two cases.

Case-1

HR

FINANCE
H

MARKETING B

Case-2

HR

FINANCE
B

MARKETING H 

G is working in the marketing department

I is neither working in the marketing

department nor in the HR department

Case-1

HR

FINANCE
H I

Read the information given below carefully and

answer the following question.

In an organisation, nine people i.e. A, B, C, D, E, F,

G, H, and I are working in different departments

viz. Marketing, Finance and HR. At least two

people are working in these departments but not

more than four people can work in one

departments. Only A is working with E in the

same department. H and B are working in

different departments but not in HR department.

G is working in the marketing department. I is

neither working in the marketing department nor

in the HR department. D is not working with I but

working with B. C is working in finance

department. C and E are working in different

departments. Only three persons are working in

marketing department

Who among the following is working together?

carefully and answer the following question.

There are nine persons P, Q, R, S, T, U, V, W and X

working in a Bank at different Designations viz.

Zonal Head, Regional Head, Cluster Head, Branch

questionHtml:
Directions:Read the information given below

carefully and answer the following question.

There are nine persons P, Q, R, S, T, U, V, W and X

working in a Bank at different Designations viz.

Zonal Head, Regional Head, Cluster Head, Branch
explanation:
The number of persons senior to V is equal to

persons junior to it.

Q is working at the lowest position in the

bank.

Zonal Head

Regional Head

Cluster Head

Branch Manager

Branch Operations Manager V

Teller Authorizer

Teller

Cashier

Welcome Desk
Q

R is immediately senior to V

Only two persons are having designations

between R and U, so there will be two cases. 

X is designated immediately next to U

Case 1

Zonal Head

Regional Head

Cluster Head

Branch Manager
R 

Branch Operations Manager V

Teller Authorizer

Teller
U 

Cashier
X

Welcome Desk
Q

Case-2

Zonal Head
U 

Regional Head
X 

Cluster Head

Branch Manager
R 

Branch Operations Manager V

Teller Authorizer

Teller

Cashier

Welcome Desk
Q

Four persons are designated between X and S

X is senior to S, therefore, Case-1 will get

eliminated.

question:
Directions:Read the information given below

carefully and answer the following question.

There are nine persons P, Q, R, S, T, U, V, W and X

working in a Bank at different Designations viz.

Zonal Head, Regional Head, Cluster Head, Branch

Manager, Branch Operations Manager, Teller

Authorizer, 
Teller, 
Cashier, 
Welcome 
Desk.

Consider Zonal Head as the highest position and

Welcome desk as the lowest position.

The number of persons senior to V is equal to

persons junior to it. Q is working at the lowest

position in the bank. R is immediately senior to V.

Only two persons are having designations

between R and U. P is neither Teller Authorizer

nor Cashier. X is designated immediately next to

U. Four persons are designated between X and S.

X is senior to S. T is designated at higher position

to W.

How many people are working at higher

positions to T?
